Inviting '''new''' users to the [[Finch App|Finch Self-care app]] has special rewards for you depending on how many join. (Rewards listed here are advertised in game and subject to change.) When your friend accepts the invitation, they get a free micropet!  
[[File:InvitingAnewUser.jpg|thumb]]
Start at the "Friends" tree icon (a.k.a. [[Tree Towns|Tree Town]]), on the fourth tab at the bottom of the app screen. 

Your Tree Town may be empty, but the "Add friend" button is front and center. 
{{Clear}}
[[File:Add friend choices.png|thumb]]Click and you will be offered three options:  
*Invite someone new 
*Find a friend 
*Share your link 
When you choose to invite someone, a page shows you the rewards for inviting people.{{clear}} 

Note that Invitation rewards are only if the person is '''new to Finch'''. If someone has been playing for more than a few days, rewards will not be received.

==Sending an Invite== 
[[File:Invite select a micropet.png|thumb]]Click "Invite someone new." Now you get the chance to choose a micropet to delight your friend! They are subject to change, but as of February 2025, the choices are [[Oatmeal the Llama]], [[Talon the Gryphon]], [[Pinecone the Hedgie]], [[Boopty the Spoopty]] (ghost), [[Blizzard the Wizard]] (polar bear), and [[Aurora the Arctic Fox]]. Click one, and its' name will appear on the invite bar, such as "Send Aurora." 

[[File:ChoosetoInviteaNewUser.jpg|thumb]]That will take you to your device, where you can choose how to share the link/code, such as text message, e-mail, bluetooth, Discord, etc. When your friend clicks the link, they will be taken to the app store to download Finch. If your friend has already joined Finch, they can use your friend code in the "Find a friend" option. 
Note that Invitation rewards are only if the person is '''new to Finch'''. If someone has been playing for more than a few days, rewards will not be received. {{Clear}}

==Rewards== 
Rewards are advertised in game and subject to change. You get a reward for each invite a '''new player''' accepts, up to three. Current rewards: 
# [[Rainbow Stones]] and an animal hood for your birb to wear 
# a [[Legendary Plushie Collection|plushie]] for your birb to carry 
# a micropet for you! (The current micropet reward for 3 invites is [[Cookie the Cow]]. She is not exclusive; she can also be obtained at random by hatching eggs from [[Professor Oat]].) 

==Non-invites==
===Find a friend===
Choose this option when you have someone's 10-digit friend code. Type in their code to add them. 

There are many places where existing Finch players are eager to exchange codes and make new friends, such as our [[Friend Code Exchange]] right here on the wiki. Other places to find friends are [[Official Finch Communities|official Finch communities]] such as Reddit, Discord, Facebook, Instagram etc. Links are provided in the game.<ref>[[File:TopLeftHamburgerThreeLinesSettingsIcon.png|thumb|Menu pulldown icon]] [[File:ConnecttoCommunitiesButton.jpg|thumb]]To find the Communities links in the game, go to the top left Menu pulldown icon on the Home page. Go to the Communities area and pick "Join our Finch communities."</ref> 

===Share your link===
This option takes you to your device as above, where you can choose how to share your link/code, such as text message, e-mail, bluetooth, discord, etc. This gives your 10-digit code for your friend to enter in the "Find a friend" option (above). As an alternative, it also gives an encoded web link. 

==Troubleshooting== 
[[File:Settings -Preferences - Manage your visitors - Disable friend requests.png|thumb]]If you have difficulty connecting with your friend, it may be due to a typo when entering the 10-digit code. If that's not the case, then you or your friend might have disabled friend requests. There are two ways to reach this particular setting. On the Tree Town screen, use the Settings icon (round cogwheel) at the top right of the screen. Alternatively, go to the Menu pulldown (top left icon on the Home tab screen), scroll down to Preferences, and choose "Manage your visitors." If the "Disable friend requests" is green, toggle it off. This will allow you and your friend to connect.  {{Clear}}
